programs.title: Long Lost Family
programs.desc: The incredible true story of a man left on the front seat of a car in Northern Ireland and a woman abandoned six years later in a telephone box in the Republic of Ireland.

programs.title: Antiques Roadshow
programs.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Yorkshire where a packed house awaits at Saltaire's Victoria Hall. Amongst the family treasures is a doodle by Lowry worth a small fortune.

programs.title: Hard Quiz
programs.sub_title: Hello Kitty, Triumph motorcycles, Michael J. Fox & Gilbert and Sullivan
programs.desc: Tom Gleeson awards the Big Brass Mug to whichever expert best answers his Hard Quiz questions on their expert topic: Hello Kitty, Triumph motorcycles, actor Michael J. Fox, and composers Gilbert and Sullivan!

programs.title: ABC News
programs.desc: News from where we live. ABC News Victoria brings you the day's top stories, exclusive investigations and original reporting on the issues that matter to you. Presented by Tamara Oudyn (Sun-Thu) and Iskhandar Razak (Fri-Sat).

Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programs.title: Back Roads
programs.desc: Back Roads continues along Central Australia's remote Binns Track, connecting people and cultures. Rae Johnston arrives just in time for one of the most action-packed events in the Northern Territory, the Harts Range Races.
